Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to start after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed in a case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Time elapsed between the final SW-Reviewer Agreed and the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in each case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where multiple reviewer agreements (SW-Reviewer Agreed) occurred versus cases with only one
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Minimum waiting time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after all required reviewers have agreed (i.e., after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in manuscripts that underwent major revision (e.g., following SW-EIC Major Revision) versus those that did not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision occurs

Name: Time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants leading to acceptance (e.g., ending with RW-EIC Accept) versus rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision compared to the duration of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurs

Name: Total time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be completed after the first reviewer agrees (first SW-Reviewer Agreed)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from the completion of all reviewer-related activities (last SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Reviewer No Response) to the start of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases involving editor reassignment (e.g., containing Assign a Different Editor) versus those without
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and the end of case where activity 'Assign a Different Editor occurs
